nasb.text: Come, let Us go down and there confuse their language, so that they will not understand one another’s speech.”

esv.text: Come, let us go down and there confuse their language, so that they may not understand one another’s speech.”

cnv.text: 來，我們下去，在那裡混亂他們的語言，使他們聽不懂對方的話。”

ccb.text: 让我们下去变乱他们的语言，使他们彼此言语不通。”

csbs.text: 来吧！让我们下去，在那里把他们的语言变乱，使他们彼此听不懂对方的语言。”
